name: log_call
description: Persist a completed call to the broker's dashboard. Called exactly once per call, from HappyRobot's post-call node after extraction and classification are done. The backend is idempotent on session_id — safe to retry on transient failure. HappyRobot sends ended_at + call_duration_seconds; the server computes started_at.

session_id.description: Unique ID for this call. Use the HappyRobot Session Id variable verbatim.

mc_number.description: MC number the carrier gave. Null if carrier didn't provide one (e.g., abandoned before MC capture).

load_id.description: Load ID the call was about. Null for outcomes that didn't involve a load (no_match, carrier_ineligible, abandoned).

outcome.description: How the call ended. Exactly one. See classification.md for rules.

final_price.description: Agreed USD price. Present only when outcome=booked.

negotiation_rounds.description: How many evaluate_offer calls happened. 0 for instant accept at listed rate, or for outcomes that never entered negotiation.

ended_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC. Use HappyRobot's Now (UTC) variable.

call_duration_seconds.description: How long the call lasted. Use HappyRobot's Call Duration variable. The server uses this plus ended_at to compute started_at.

status.description: 'updated' if a retry matched an existing session_id

notes_for_happyrobot_author: started_at is NOT in the request body — the server derives it from ended_at - call_duration_seconds.
extracted (nested object with carrier_equipment, notes_from_carrier, etc.) is optional and omitted in this version. Will be added back when HR's extraction node surfaces those fields.
